summary: Planned a scoped repair path for contributor PR #93893 and quarantined the linked security-sensitive issue #93854. No GitHub mutation is planned directly by the worker; the fix artifact gives the guarded executor a repair_contributor_branch path with source PR credit preserved.

actions.reason: #93854 is the exact security-sensitive linked issue and must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling without comment, close, label, merge, or fix mutation by Clownfish.

The contributor PR is the canonical useful branch, but the calibrated job requires executor-side repair/validation before any PR action. Emit an executable fix artifact instead of merge or close planning.
A guarded fix artifact is the allowed autonomous output for repairing #93893 while preserving contributor credit and avoiding blocked direct GitHub mutations.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #93893 by first confirming on current main that overlapping user Docker binds and internal read-only workspace skill mounts can produce duplicate Docker mount targets, then narrowly deduplicate only those overlapping internal skill mounts before container creation.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(sandbox): avoid duplicate Docker skill mounts
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- repairs contributor PR #93893 by xydttsw
- confirms the duplicate Docker mount behavior on current main before changing code
- deduplicates only internal read-only workspace skill mounts that overlap user-provided Docker bind targets

## Credit
Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/93893 by xydttsw. Clownfish preserves attribution for the original report and implementation direction.

## Validation
- pnpm check:changed
- pnpm -s vitest run <focused sandbox Docker mount regression selected from checkout>
- /review

## Security handling
Linked issue #93854 is security-sensitive in the cluster artifact and is routed separately to central OpenClaw security handling. This repair must stay limited to the proven duplicate mount bug and must not redefine sandbox, auth, approval, allowlist, or trust boundaries.
likely_files: focused sandbox Docker mount regression test selected from the checkout
validation_commands: pnpm -s vitest run <focused sandbox Docker mount regression selected from checkout>
credit_notes: Preserve source PR credit for https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/93893 by xydttsw.
If the executor must replace the contributor branch instead of repairing it, the replacement PR body should explicitly credit xydttsw and cite #93893 as the source PR.
Do not claim or close #93854 in the fix PR; #93854 is routed to central security handling.
